summary: PII — false-positive review queue with bulk approve/reject
description_md:
As a compliance-officer, I want to review PII auto-tagging false positives in a dedicated queue with bulk approve/reject actions, so that I can efficiently validate the PII detection accuracy and reduce manual review time.

**Background:**
The PII Auto-Tagging feature (F-B1) occasionally misclassifies non-sensitive data as PII, requiring human review. A review queue with bulk actions will streamline the compliance officer's workflow for correcting these false positives.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
1. Given items flagged as potential PII, when I navigate to the False-Positive Review Queue, then I see a list of flagged items with their source field, detected PII type, and confidence score.
2. Given the review queue, when I select multiple items using checkboxes, then I can bulk Approve (confirm as true PII) or Reject (mark as false positive) in a single action.
3. Given I perform a bulk Reject action, then the affected items are removed from the review queue, the PII tag is removed from the data, and an entry is added to the audit log.
4. Given I perform a bulk Approve action, then the items are marked as reviewed, retained as PII, and the PII retention policy continues to apply to those records.

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: QA passed — bulk approve/reject actions correctly update audit log entries and PII tags.
